name: Neon Tokyo
description: Dark navy canvas, electric cyan and hot pink neon accents, monospace font. Futuristic, AI, and tech content.

typography.note: Use cyan for primary accent, pink for secondary. Glow effects: text-shadow 0 0 20px rgba(0,245,255,0.6). Avoid mixing both accents on same element.

css.hed: font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-weight:800; font-size:110px; color:#e8e8ff; line-height:1.05; text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,245,255,0.25);
css.capText: font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:32px; font-weight:400; color:#00f5ff; text-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(0,245,255,0.7); padding:0 140px; line-height:1.4;
